caveat: This validation used WHITE-NOISE-spectrum AR nulls; S2-C1 FPR was fine (0.0125). But real BNCI epochs are band-passed 8-30 Hz (narrowband), where the earlier probe showed FPR 0.375. The specificity failure is SPECTRUM-specific (narrowband), not merely length. A valid repair must be validated on SPECTRUM-MATCHED (8-30 Hz) 501-sample nulls.
conclusion: BNCI_BLOCKED_METHOD stands; this synthetic test does not lift the block.
